title: House sends $70B bill for ICE, Border Patrol to Trump's desk
shortDescription: The House of Representatives passed another massive cash influx for ICE and Border Patrol, giving the agencies roughly $70 billion over several years.

title: Trump DOJ moves to revoke US citizenship of 17 naturalized immigrants
shortDescription: The Justice Department under President Donald Trump seeks to revoke U.S. citizenship of 17 naturalized immigrants accused of crimes.

title: Live election results: Platner drama engulfs Maine Senate race
shortDescription: The packed primary month showcases two candidates facing significant personal and political hurdles that voters will consider

title: Bill Gates faces congressional panel as Epstein records raise scrutiny
shortDescription: Bill Gates faces congressional scrutiny over Epstein ties and will be interviewed June 10; he says he’ll answer questions and denies involvement in wrongdoing.

title: Trump appears at Knicks game with eyes closed, prompting sleep accusations again
shortDescription: President Donald Trump attended a Knicks v. Spurs NBA Finals game at Madison Square Garden in New York. A video appeared to show him falling asleep.

title: Vance says he welcomes Pope Leo's input amid Trump's feud with pontiff
shortDescription: Vice President JD Vance took a conciliatory approach to the Vatican in a USA TODAY interview after Trump sparred with Pope Leo over Iran.

title: Trump administration moves to revoke citizenship of 17 immigrants
shortDescription: The Department of Justice announced an effort to revoke the citizenship of 17 immigrants accused of criminal offenses.

title: How Maine election could affect the House
shortDescription: Democratic Rep. Jared Golden's congressional seat is up for grabs in Maine.

title: Trump turns to a Texas cattleman as screwworm spreads across Southwest
shortDescription: President Trump appointed Texas cattleman John Bellinger as the senior advisor for New World screwworm preparedness as cases in Texas continue to grow.

title: Latest on California election results for governor, LA mayor races
shortDescription: Here's what to know about two key California races and who is advancing to the November general election.

title: AOC trolls Trump, accuses him of falling asleep at Knicks game
shortDescription: The president was met with harsh criticisms after attending the Knicks game on Monday night. Here's what the congresswoman said.

title: Trump calls boos at Knicks Finals ‘mostly cheers’ after MSG appearance
shortDescription: Trump said that the crowd was very "enthusiastic" after attendees loudly booed when the president was shown on screen at Monday night's game.

title: U.S. Sen. Fetterman clears way for Trump judge nominee in PA
shortDescription: U.S. Sen. John Fetterman gave the OK for one of President Donald Trump's nominees for a federal judge position in Pennsylvania to move forward.

title: How will Kemp, Dooley 'pay-to-play' controversy impact Senate race?
shortDescription: Georgia Gov. Brian Kemp and Senate candidate Derek Dooley have been accused of participating in 'pay-to-play' politics ahead of runoff.

title: Trump says Iran shot down Army helicopter
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said the U.S. "must respond" after blaming Iran for shooting down a U.S. Apache helicopter near the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Ken Paxton's attorney endorses Talarico for US Senate
shortDescription: Former Paxton attorney Dan Cogdell endorsed Democrat James Talarico for U.S. Senate, breaking with his former client after years of defense work.

title: Trump says why he got angry at 'Meet the Press' in his interview
shortDescription: President Donald Trump left his interview with Kristen Welker on 'Meet the Press' early. He said at an event later it was the rain that angered him.

title: Daily Briefing: America's hottest elections
shortDescription: It's sweltering. And four states hold primaries today. Here is the news to know on Tuesday.

title: GOP candidates that dispute Trump’s 2020 loss are on the ballot | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Republicans who rejected Biden’s 2020 win are running for office across the nation. Winning would give them power over future elections.

title: Trump says US pilots OK after helicopter crashed near Strait of Hormuz
shortDescription: Asked if he knew what brought the helicopter down, the president said his administration would issue a report later on Tuesday, June 9.

title: Trump booed at NBA Finals game in New York
shortDescription: President Donald Trump was booed when he was shown on-screen before Game 3 of the NBA Finals between the Knicks and Spurs at Madison Square Garden.

title: Trump gets big reaction at Knicks-Spurs game at Madison Square Garden
shortDescription: Trump took in the NBA Finals tonight with with his grand daughter Kai Trump as the Knicks and Spurs battled at Madison Square Garden.
